case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS QLC MGT C/O GUERRERO ESPINOZA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $987.18 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT QLC MGT C/O GUERRERO ESPINOZA GUERRERO ESPINOZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRERO ESPINOZA $987.18 PRINCIPAL, $15.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,002.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO ESPINOZA
